name: czrecoilframe_set_hw_api_and_init_mode
description: CZRecoilFrame::SetHwApiAndInitMode selects a hardware API, updates persisted video options, queries video memory, and switches to the hardware video mode.
known_limits: The smoke verifies hardware API, fullscreen, acceleration, hardware-mode, video-mode, replicate, view-section, video-memory, and command UI side effects.
Binary-safe verification remains pending for exact provider callback and member-call shape.
